listing.title: AI App Store Screenshot Generator
listing.tagline: Generate 800+ localized App Store and Play Play screenshots across 39 languages and 3 device sizes — automatically
listing.description: App Store screenshot generation is a pain point for every mobile app team. Existing tools (Fastlane, ScreenshotFramer) require manual template setup and don't handle localization well. This AI-powered pipeline takes a single design template and automatically generates 800+ localized screenshots across 39+ languages and 3 device sizes (iPhone 6.7", iPhone 6.5", iPhone 5.5"), then exports directly to App Store Connect and Google Play Console formats.
key_features: AI-powered translation across 39+ languages with context awareness
3 device size variants generated in parallel (iPhone 6.7", 6.5", 5.5")
Brand kit system — consistent colors, fonts, and layout across all variants
Batch processing — generate screenshots for multiple apps simultaneously
CI/CD integration — auto-update screenshots on every release

metrics.community_signal: Based on real dev.to article with 200+ reactions
